content: Whiterun Guard: Aye, lass, you look like you've been dipped in daedra fire and dragged through a bandit camp. What in Oblivion happened to you? Daegon: Oh, just the usual—fucked a few Draugr to death, watched Korpse nibble on a bandit’s corpse, then had my ass railed by a giant. You know... Skyrim things. Whiterun Guard: Sounds like a slow day compared to the shit I’ve seen. Had a pack of feral Rieklings try to sack the city yesterday. Little blue bastards were raping the livestock before we put ‘em down. Daegon: Mmm, shame you didn’t save one for me. I bet they’d be fun to break. Whiterun Guard: Fuck’s wrong with you? Then again, I caught two Stormcloak scouts fucking in the watchtower last night. Called it treason, but they just moaned louder. Daegon: Gods, I love this province.
Whiterun Guard: Aye, well... if you see any more of those Rieklings, send ‘em my way. My blade’s still thirsty. Daegon: And my legs are still spread. Priorities, guard.
